shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/hooks/useMultipleSelection/reducer.js src/hooks/useMultipleSelection/__tests__/getSelectedItemProps.test.js src/hooks/useMultipleSelection/__tests__/props.test.js'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "useMultipleSelection activeIndex Backspace Delete reducer"'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"In Downshift's useMultipleSelection reducer, SelectedItemKeyDownBackspace and SelectedItemKeyDownDelete must be no-ops when activeIndex is invalid (less than 0 or greater than/equal to selectedItems.length). Only an active selected-item index may drive removal; otherwise slicing with -1 or stale indices can mutate selectedItems incorrectly. Regression coverage should dispatch Backspace/Delete directly on an unfocused selected-item chip and assert selectedItems remain unchanged.\" -t \"useMultipleSelection deletion requires valid activeIndex\" --unit-type learning -l downshift -l regression -s codex -i 0.8"

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba src/hooks/useMultipleSelection/reducer.js | sed -n '24,48p'; nl -ba src/hooks/useMultipleSelection/__tests__/getSelectedItemProps.test.js | sed -n '208,235p'; nl -ba src/hooks/useMultipleSelection/__tests__/props.test.js | sed -n '568,585p'"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
